---
name: Package Request
about: Request a new Nexora-compatible package or port
title: "[PACKAGE] "
labels: package-request
assignees: ''
---

## Package Information

- **Package Name**: [e.g., express, lodash, moment]
- **npm Link**: [e.g., https://www.npmjs.com/package/express]
- **GitHub Link**: [e.g., https://github.com/expressjs/express]

## Description

A brief description of what this package does and why it's useful.

## Use Case

Describe how you plan to use this package in your Nexora projects.

## Current Status

- [ ] Package works out of the box with Nexora
- [ ] Package requires modifications to work with Nexora
- [ ] Package needs a native port for optimal performance
- [ ] Package is not compatible and needs a rewrite

## Compatibility Notes

If you've already tried using this package with Nexora, please describe any issues encountered.

## Alternatives

Are there alternative packages that serve a similar purpose? Are they Nexora-compatible?

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the package request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing package requests to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have checked if the package is actively maintained
- [ ] I have provided all required information above
